zh.lifeSummary: 當Isabel de Hastings於1210年出生在英國英格蘭諾福爾可阿希爾時，她的父親William de Hastings45歲，母親Margaret le Bigod28歲。她於大約1250年與William Threlkeld在英國英格蘭維斯特莫藍德結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於大約1260年在英國英格蘭維斯特莫藍德享年51歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Isabel de Hastings于1210年出生在英国英格兰諾福爾可阿希爾时，她的父亲William de Hastings45岁，母亲Margaret le Bigod28岁。她于大约1250年与William Threlkeld在英国英格兰維斯特莫藍德结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。她去世于大约1260年在英国英格兰維斯特莫藍德享年51岁。

nameMeanings.name: Hastings
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish: habitational name from Hastings (Sussex), near which the English army was defeated by the Normans in 1066. The placename derives from an Old English personal name Hǣsta + the Old English groupname suffix -ingas. In the latter part of the 12th century, at the time of William the Lion, the surname was taken to Scotland, where it assimilated instances of the native Scottish surname Harestane.
English: variant of Hasting with Middle English genitival -s.
Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó hOistín ‘descendant of Oistín’, the Gaelic form of the personal name Augustine (see Austin ).

variants.name: Hasting
meanings: English: from the Norman personal name Hastang, Hastenc, Hasten (Old Norse Hásteinn ‘high’ + ‘stone’). See also Hastings .

variants.name: Heston
meanings: English: habitational name from Heston (Middlesex) or Histon (Cambridgeshire). The Middlesex placename derives from Old English hǣs ‘brushwood’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’, while the Cambridgeshire placename may derive from Old English hyse ‘shoot, tendril’, also ‘son, youth’, + tūn.

nameMeanings.name: Isabel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

variants.name: Isabelle
meanings: form of   Isabel  , now in frequent use in the English-speaking world.

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of the various boys' names with the first syllable Ed-, especially Edward .

variants.name: Edward
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + weard ‘guard’. This has been one of the most successful of all Old English names, in frequent use from before the Conquest to the present day, and even being exported into other European languages. It was the name of three Anglo-Saxon kings and has been borne by eight kings of England since the Norman Conquest. It is also the name of the youngest son of Queen Elizabeth II . The most influential early bearer was King Edward the Confessor ( ?1002–66 ; ruled 1042–66 ). In a troubled period of English history, he contrived to rule fairly and (for a time at any rate) firmly. But in the latter part of his reign he paid more attention to his religion than to his kingdom. He died childless, and his death sparked off conflicting claims to his throne, which were resolved by the victory of William the Conqueror at the Battle of Hastings. His memory was honoured by Normans and English alike, for his fairness and his piety. Edward's mother was Norman; he had spent part of his youth in Normandy; and William claimed to have been nominated by Edward as his successor. Edward was canonized in the 12th century, and came to be venerated throughout Europe as a model of a Christian king.

en.lifeSummary: When Isabel de Hastings was born in 1210, in Ashill, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom, her father, William de Hastings, was 45 and her mother, Margaret le Bigod, was 28. She married William Threlkeld about 1250, in Westmorland, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died about 1260, in Westmorland, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 51.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Isabel de Hastings est née en 1210, à Ashill, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William de Hastings, avait 45 ans et sa mère, Margaret le Bigod, avait 28 ans. Elle a épousé William Threlkeld environ 1250, à Westmorland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée environ 1260, à Westmorland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 51 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Isabel de Hastings 1210 in Ashill, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William de Hastings 45 und ihre Mutter Margaret le Bigod 28. Sie hat um 1250 in Westmorland, England, United Kingdom William Threlkeld geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb um 1260 im Alter von 51 Jahren in Westmorland, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Isabel de Hastings è nata il nel 1210 nel Ashill, Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, William de Hastings, aveva 45 anni e sua madre, Margaret le Bigod, aveva 28 anni. Lei sposato William Threlkeld circa 1250, nel Westmorland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì circa 1260, nel Westmorland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 51 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Isabel de Hastings(이)가 1210년 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 애시에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William de Hastings(은)는 45세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret le Bigod(은)는 28세였다. 그녀는 대략 1250년 영국 잉글랜드 웨스트모를랜드에서 William Threlkeld(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1260년 영국 잉글랜드 웨스트모를랜드에서 51세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Isabel de Hastings родилась в 1210 г. в местности ашилл, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени William de Hastings было 45 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret le Bigod, 28. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William Threlkeld около 1250 г. в местности вестморланд, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла около 1260 г. в местности вестморланд, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 51 год.
